betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6High-Power Steam Condenser§f processes §bLow-Pressure Steam§f using electricity.

§eCapacity:§f
Handles up to §e60mB/t§f - essential for large turbine setups.

§eFunction:§f
• Converts Low-Pressure Steam back to water
• Enables closed-loop steam systems
• Electric-powered operation

§eInfrastructure:§f
Required for returning steam to boilers in large-scale power setups.

§aTip:§f Size appropriately for your turbine output to avoid steam backup.
